home.title: Project template
home.description: This is a default template for building further applications. It contains no functional logic — just a ready-made environment to start building on.

register.title: Register
register.successMessage: We've sent a verification link to your email. You can now sign in.

consent.pageDescription: Grant or deny access to your data.
consent.title: Grant access
consent.requestedBy: is requesting access to the following data from your account.
consent.actionError: Failed to complete the action. Please try again.

consentRejected.title: Access denied
consentRejected.message: Without granting access to data within this application, you won't have full access to the template. If this was a mistake, you can <link>sign in again</link> and grant access.

oauthCallback.profileLoadError: Signed in, but loading your profile failed.
oauthCallback.googleFailed: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.

version.title: Version
version.subtitle: Diagnostic page — current build info for both services.
version.compatible: Backend and frontend versions are compatible ({{backend}} / {{frontend}}).
version.mismatch: Version mismatch: backend {{backend}} vs frontend {{frontend}}. Compatibility issues may occur.
